meaning: adj.坏的,邪恶的,缺德的,不道德的,恶劣的,刻毒的,淘气的
examples: Jane has a wicked sense of humour.
The judge liked using the word "wicked" of people he had sent to jail.
Unfortunately for the wicked there is not an unlimited amount of oil on earth.
He and his wife, played by Robin Wright, make a deliciously wicked power couple.
